methods.method_name: Algal Culture Preparation and Experiment Protocol
methods.description: Process for growing T. pseudonana cells and preparing them for experiments involving oxygen measurements and fluorescence kinetics.

steps.description: T. pseudonana cells were grown as air-lift cultures with silica-enriched f/2 medium at 20°C in a 14/10 h light/dark cycle.
steps.searchable_summary: grow T. pseudonana cells in silica-enriched medium under controlled light/dark cycle

steps.description: Cells were harvested by centrifugation (10 min at 3000 g and 18°C) and concentrated to a Chl a content of 100-150 µg ml⁻¹.
steps.searchable_summary: harvest and concentrate cells by centrifugation

methods.description: Simultaneous measurements of oxygen evolution/consumption and chlorophyll fluorescence using specialized equipment.

steps.description: Simultaneous measurements of oxygen evolution/consumption and chlorophyll fluorescence were performed at 20°C with a Clark type oxygen electrode and a PAM 101 fluorometer.
steps.searchable_summary: measure oxygen and chlorophyll fluorescence using Clark electrode and PAM 101 fluorometer

steps.description: Slow changes of variable chlorophyll fluorescence were recorded using the saturating pulse method.
steps.searchable_summary: record slow changes in chlorophyll fluorescence using saturating pulse method

methods.method_name: Fast Fluorescence Induction Kinetics and 830 nm Absorption Changes
methods.description: Measurement of fast fluorescence induction kinetics and absorption changes at 830 nm to study P700 oxidation/reduction.

steps.description: Fast fluorescence induction kinetics and absorption changes at 830 nm were simultaneously measured during the saturating pulse applied with the Dual-PAM-100.
steps.searchable_summary: measure fast fluorescence induction and 830 nm absorption changes using Dual-PAM-100

steps.description: P700 oxidation/reduction was measured in the transmission mode and calculated as the signal at 875 nm minus the signal at 830 nm.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate P700 oxidation/reduction from 875 nm and 830 nm signals

methods.description: Analysis of pigment composition and non-photochemical quenching (NPQ) using HPLC.

steps.description: Samples for pigment analysis were collected at different time points and rapidly frozen in liquid nitrogen.
steps.searchable_summary: collect and freeze samples for pigment analysis

steps.description: Frozen cells were slowly defrosted and collected on a glass fibre filter, pigments were extracted with a medium consisting of 90% methanol/0.2 M ammonium acetate and 10% ethyl acetate.
steps.searchable_summary: defrost and extract pigments from cells

steps.description: Pigment analysis was carried out on a HPLC system equipped with a Nucleosil ET 250/8/4, 300-5, C18 column.
